resources.string: Bring the full product back into sync.
Sign in with Google to recover history, restore preferences, and keep your product state synced across devices.
What comes back with your session
Edits, day buckets, and archive browsing stay tied to one account.
Pack price, day-start hour, and map preferences stay stable across devices.
Reduction targets and product preferences stay tied to the same account.
This keeps the same product scope
Logging, analytics, map insights, archive editing, goals, and settings all stay intact. This screen only restores the account context around them.
Use the same account to preserve your archive, analytics framing, and settings across devices.
